title: Bitaxe Gamma
content: Bitaxe Gamma is a fully open-source Bitcoin ASIC miner equipped with the BM1370 ASIC chip from Antminer's S21 Pro. This design ensures efficient and powerful mining capabilities, achieving ~1.2TH/s at an energy efficiency of 14J/TH. It operates using a 5V DC 6A power supply connected via a 2.1/5.5mm barrel jack connector.
